title: firmware_version validation logic duplicated in adapter.c and codec.c
description:
Files: 
- lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/adapter.c:1235-1273 (has_compatible_firmware_brand, starts_with_lichen_brand)
- lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/codec.c:477-511 (info_firmware_version)

Both files independently implement the same firmware version validation logic:
1. Check string starts with LICHEN brand
2. Scan for 'meshtastic' substring (case-insensitive)
3. Reject if found

If the validation rules change, both implementations must be updated.

Fix: Extract the validation into a single shared function.
